name: healthcare_technology_model_based_triage_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A Healthcare Technology response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare technology model based triage lumen tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Inez Chandra
agents.identity: I am Inez Chandra, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Harper Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Harper Ishikawa, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Inez Chandra must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Inez Chandra do?
